query:
SELECT a.id, a.nome, a.tipoArquivo, e.nome as estabelecimento, DATE_FORMAT(a.createdAt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as importadoEm
FROM arquivos a 
LEFT JOIN convenios c ON a.convenioId = c.id 
LEFT JOIN estabelecimentos e ON a.estabelecimentoId = e.id
WHERE a.direcao = 'retornado' AND (c.nome LIKE '%nimed%' OR c.nome LIKE '%NIMED%')
ORDER BY a.createdAt DESC 
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2xKWvZvidGuv3Qt.root --database 98MRdVE9Uf2ZRMz25bPSye --execute SELECT a.id, a.nome, a.tipoArquivo, e.nome as estabelecimento, DATE_FORMAT(a.createdAt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as importadoEm
FROM arquivos a 
LEFT JOIN convenios c ON a.convenioId = c.id 
LEFT JOIN estabelecimentos e ON a.estabelecimentoId = e.id
WHERE a.direcao = 'retornado' AND (c.nome LIKE '%nimed%' OR c.nome LIKE '%NIMED%')
ORDER BY a.createdAt DESC 
LIMIT 10;
